query:
UPDATE profiles
            SET
                avatar_url = CASE WHEN $2 THEN $3 ELSE avatar_url END,
                display_name = CASE WHEN $4 THEN $5 ELSE display_name END,
                custom_status = CASE WHEN $6 THEN $7 ELSE custom_status END,
                updated_at = now()
            WHERE id = $1
            RETURNING
                id,
                username,
                display_name,
                avatar_url,
                status,
                custom_status,
                created_at,
                updated_at
